purpose: External series merged into build/data/cm_panel/cm_weight_panel.parquet for the Converse-Mallucci F3 weight regression.

GPRC_China.name: Caldara-Iacoviello country-specific Geopolitical Risk index, China
GPRC_China.SOURCE: Caldara, Dario and Matteo Iacoviello (2022), 'Measuring Geopolitical Risk', American Economic Review 112(4). Country file data_gpr_export.xls, column GPRC_CHN. Fetched 2026-06-30.

VIX.name: CBOE Volatility Index (control: log VIX)
VIX.collapse: quarterly average of daily; log taken for regressor log_vix
VIX.SOURCE: FRED VIXCLS (CBOE via St. Louis Fed). Fetched 2026-06-30.

broad_dollar.name: Nominal Broad US Dollar Index
broad_dollar.SOURCE: FRED DTWEXBGS (Federal Reserve Board H.10). Fetched 2026-06-30.

oil.name: WTI Crude Oil spot price
oil.SOURCE: FRED DCOILWTICO (EIA via St. Louis Fed). Fetched 2026-06-30.

relative_returns.name: CM valuation control: return on CN-nationality holdings relative to rest of foreign portfolio
relative_returns.construction: MCHI (iShares MSCI China ETF, adjusted-close = total return incl. dividends) quarterly return MINUS ACWX (iShares MSCI ACWI ex-US ETF, adjusted-close TR) quarterly return. Quarter return = adjclose_last/adjclose_first - 1 within each fiscal quarter.

real_schema_confirmed.MCHI: chart.result[0].indicators.adjclose present, n=1569 daily obs from 2019

relative_returns.LIMITATIONS: (1) MCHI is an MSCI China equity ETF, a PROXY for CN-nationality haven exposure (which spans ADRs/H-shares/red-chips; MCHI covers most but not all). (2) ACWX (ACWI ex-US) is a broad-foreign proxy, not the exact non-China-haven portfolio composition. (3) Both are USD-denominated TR ETFs, so FX is embedded. This is the best available FREE relative-valuation proxy; the regression is also run WITHOUT relative_returns as a robustness check.
relative_returns.SOURCE: Yahoo Finance v8 chart API, MCHI and ACWX adjusted close. Fetched 2026-06-30.

fx_dict_used.note: HKMA Linked-Exchange-Rate peg midpoint; minor-currency fixed rates per build/audit/freemap_coverage_recompute.py MINOR_RATES (TWD30,EUR0.90,...). Identical to the FX dict used in panel_crosswalk_tagged construction.

alignment_verification: cm_weight_panel re-attaches holder=cik|series_id and fiscal_quarter from the SOURCE panel haven subset by the documented positional alignment; verified currency_value byte-identical row-for-row (max abs diff 0.0) AND issuer_name/cusip/isin identical before trusting.
